PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VUONG, PETER PHUC KIEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WARNECKE, ELISABETH $9,279.24 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,279.24, STATUTORY COSTS OF SUIT ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF PETER PHUC KIEN VUONG.
